title: Spring & Spring Boot
description: A complete path through the Spring ecosystem from beginner to expert: Spring Core (IoC & DI), AOP, Spring Boot, web and REST with Spring MVC, data access with JPA and transactions, Spring Security, reactive programming with WebFlux, messaging and integration, testing, microservices with Spring Cloud, observability, caching and performance, cloud-native deployment, and advanced/expert topics including Spring Batch, Modulith, AI, GraphQL, AOT/native image and framework internals — targeting Spring Framework 7 and Spring Boot 4.
